description: Express REST API and MCP Server Framework is a comprehensive development framework for building RESTful APIs and MCP servers with Express.js. It provides a complete template for creating production-ready APIs using Node.js, Express, Mongoose (MongoDB), and Sequelize (SQL databases).

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.

findings.title: Excessive Permission Surface
findings.recommendation: Tool requests broad permissions (exec/fs/network). Validate input parameters using Enums where possible, and restrict file system operations to explicit allowed directories.

findings.title: DoS Resilience — Missing Rate Limit / Timeout
findings.description: tool performs network or execution operations but declares no rate-limit, timeout, or retry configuration
findings.recommendation: Declare explicit rate-limit, timeout, and retry configuration for all network and execution tools. Implement exponential back-off and surface resource state to the calling agent.

findings.title: Typosquatting
findings.description: tool name "pg_describe_table" is suspiciously similar to the well-known MCP tool "describe_table" (edit distance 2) — possible typosquatting
findings.recommendation: This tool name closely resembles a well-known MCP tool name. Verify the server's authenticity before use. If you maintain this server, rename the tool to avoid collision with the canonical tool it resembles.
